evals.name: onboarding-redesign
evals.prompt: Redesign an onboarding flow for a project management app — 4 steps: welcome, create first project, invite team, set up first task. Build it as a working HTML page with animations.
evals.expected_output: A polished, multi-step onboarding flow with clear progress indicator, smooth transitions between steps, helpful microcopy, and responsive design

assertions.name: has-progress-indicator
assertions.description: Visual progress bar or step indicator

evals.name: pricing-table
evals.prompt: Build a clean, responsive pricing table with 3 tiers (Free, Pro, Enterprise) and a toggle between monthly/annual billing. Make it production-ready HTML.
evals.expected_output: A responsive pricing component with three tier cards, a billing toggle with smooth animation, clear feature comparison, and prominent CTAs

assertions.name: has-cta-buttons
assertions.description: Each tier has a CTA button

evals.name: checkout-fix
evals.prompt: The checkout flow has a 40% drop-off rate. Redesign the checkout page with better UX, clearer error handling, and trust signals. Build it as a working HTML page.
evals.expected_output: A streamlined checkout page with inline validation, clear error messages, trust signals, order summary, and mobile-optimized layout

evals.name: design-system-tokens
evals.prompt: /design-system Generate a complete token system from brand color #2563eb with dark mode support
evals.expected_output: CSS custom properties with full color palette (10 shades), semantic colors, typography scale, spacing scale, and dark mode overrides

assertions.name: has-semantic-colors
assertions.description: Success, warning, error, info colors defined

assertions.name: has-dark-mode
assertions.description: Dark mode overrides present ([data-theme=dark] or @media prefers-color-scheme)

assertions.name: has-typography-scale
assertions.description: Font sizes from xs to 5xl defined

assertions.name: has-spacing-scale
assertions.description: Spacing values on a consistent grid

evals.name: design-review-audit
evals.prompt: /design-review ./test-page.html — audit this landing page for accessibility, usability, visual consistency, content quality, and motion design
evals.expected_output: Structured 5-point audit report with specific issues, severity levels, and actionable fix recommendations

assertions.name: checks-accessibility
assertions.description: WCAG AA contrast and keyboard nav checked

assertions.name: checks-visual-consistency
assertions.description: Spacing, color, and typography consistency evaluated

assertions.name: has-severity-levels
assertions.description: Issues categorized by severity (critical, major, minor)

assertions.name: has-fix-suggestions
assertions.description: Each issue includes a specific remediation

evals.name: brand-kit-generation
evals.expected_output: Complete brand kit with color palette, typography, spacing, and component tokens in CSS and Tailwind formats

assertions.name: has-primary-palette
assertions.description: Primary color expanded to full shade scale

assertions.name: has-neutrals
assertions.description: Neutral gray palette with brand tint

assertions.name: has-typography
assertions.description: Font pairing and type scale defined

evals.name: responsive-dashboard
evals.prompt: /design Build a real-time analytics dashboard with sidebar navigation, KPI cards, line chart, and data table. Must be responsive.
evals.expected_output: Full dashboard page with sidebar, KPI summary cards, chart area, data table, responsive breakpoints, and professional styling

assertions.name: professional-styling
assertions.description: Uses design tokens and consistent spacing

evals.name: figma-create-wireframe
evals.prompt: /figma-create Build a 3-screen wireframe for a task management app: task list, task detail, and create task modal
evals.expected_output: Three Figma frames at standard sizes with auto-layout, placeholder content, and wireframe-appropriate styling

assertions.name: creates-3-frames
assertions.description: Three distinct frames created in Figma

evals.name: ux-audit-compliance
evals.prompt: /ux-audit Check the design file for: 4 required pages, frame sizes at 1440×900, at least 10 paint styles, and component sets with proper variants
evals.expected_output: Compliance audit report with pass/fail for each requirement and specific findings

assertions.name: has-pass-fail
assertions.description: Each requirement has clear pass/fail status

evals.name: design-sprint-facilitation
evals.prompt: /design-sprint Users are abandoning the signup flow — 60% drop-off between email entry and account creation
evals.expected_output: Structured design sprint with problem mapping, 8 solution ideas, decision matrix, prototype specification, and testing plan

assertions.name: has-8-solutions
assertions.description: At least 8 distinct solution ideas generated

assertions.name: has-test-plan
assertions.description: Usability test script with tasks and metrics

evals.name: design-handoff-docs
evals.prompt: /design-handoff Generate a developer handoff document from the current Figma file with CSS variables and Tailwind config
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive handoff doc with token maps, component specs, spacing reference, and code outputs in multiple formats

assertions.name: has-color-tokens
assertions.description: Color tokens extracted with hex values

evals.name: design-presentation
evals.prompt: /design-present Create a walkthrough presentation of the design with annotations for a stakeholder review
evals.expected_output: Self-contained HTML presentation with slides, keyboard navigation, annotations, and speaker notes

assertions.name: is-single-html
assertions.description: Output is a single HTML file

assertions.name: has-annotations
assertions.description: Design decision annotations on screen slides

assertions.name: has-slide-structure
assertions.description: Title slide, screen slides, summary slide

evals.name: figma-responsive-variants
evals.prompt: /figma-responsive Generate mobile (375×812) and tablet (768×1024) variants from the desktop hero frame
evals.expected_output: Two new Figma frames cloned and adapted from the desktop source with layout reflowed for smaller breakpoints

assertions.name: adapts-layout
assertions.description: Multi-column grids reflowed for smaller widths

assertions.name: proper-naming
assertions.description: Frames named with / Mobile and / Tablet suffixes

evals.name: figma-sync-check
evals.prompt: /figma-sync Compare the current Figma file's tokens against the project's CSS variables and report drift
evals.expected_output: Sync report with percentage score, categorized drift (colors, typography, spacing, components), and patch suggestions

assertions.name: extracts-figma-tokens
assertions.description: Paint styles and text styles extracted from Figma

assertions.name: extracts-code-tokens
assertions.description: CSS variables or Tailwind config parsed from code

assertions.name: compares-colors
assertions.description: Color values compared with match/mismatch/missing status

assertions.name: has-patch-suggestions
assertions.description: Concrete code or Figma patches suggested

assertions.name: identifies-direction
assertions.description: Asks which is source of truth before patching

evals.name: figma-prototype-flow
evals.prompt: /figma-prototype Auto-connect the screens in the current file into a linear flow with slide transitions
evals.expected_output: Prototype connections created between screens with appropriate transitions and a flow starting point set

assertions.name: scans-screens
assertions.description: All top-level frames identified as screens

assertions.name: identifies-interactive-elements
assertions.description: Buttons, links, and CTAs found in each screen

assertions.name: creates-connections
assertions.description: Prototype reactions added to interactive elements

assertions.name: uses-transitions
assertions.description: Slide-in transitions applied with appropriate direction

assertions.name: sets-starting-point
assertions.description: Flow starting point set on first screen

evals.name: site-to-figma-capture
evals.prompt: /site-to-figma https://example.com Capture the above-fold layout and recreate it in Figma with extracted styles
evals.expected_output: Figma page created with recreated layout sections, extracted paint/text styles, and reference screenshot

assertions.name: extracts-styles
assertions.description: Colors and typography extracted from computed styles

assertions.name: creates-figma-page
assertions.description: New Figma page created for the capture

assertions.name: recreates-sections
assertions.description: Major layout sections recreated as Figma frames

assertions.name: creates-paint-styles
assertions.description: Extracted colors saved as Figma paint styles

assertions.name: creates-text-styles
assertions.description: Extracted typography saved as Figma text styles

evals.name: component-docs-generation
evals.prompt: /component-docs Generate documentation for all component sets in the current Figma file
evals.expected_output: Markdown documentation with prop tables, variant grids, specs, usage guidelines, and code examples for each component

assertions.name: lists-all-components
assertions.description: All component sets discovered and documented

assertions.name: has-prop-tables
assertions.description: Property tables with type, default, and options

assertions.name: has-dimension-specs
assertions.description: Width, height, padding, and radius documented
